transcript: What is it? Is it the tune? Is it the set of musical notes used? Now in India, we are told that, you know, learn English, learn English because it's a relatively global language and wherever you go, you'll be able to communicate. True that. So I'll take the example of English to demonstrate my point. D A U G H T E R. This word. It's made up of letters, set of letters. Give it to an Indian and they would pronounce it as daughter. The same language, the same word, the same set of letters. But what made the difference?
